summary: Ezekiel prophesies judgment on Israel and surrounding nations while presenting visions of divine glory, spiritual renewal, and the restoration of the temple.
historical_context: Ezekiel ministered during the Babylonian exile. His visions combine symbolic imagery, prophetic warnings, and future restoration.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Ezekiel reveals the spiritual death of a people separated from God.
mirror_water_fire.water: Visions of cleansing water symbolize purification and renewal.
mirror_water_fire.fire: The valley of dry bones becomes a transformative image of resurrection.
